working_on: Routine task AUDIT-MET (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — Metaphysics subdomain audit. SEP-anchored review of a deterministic 35%-density edge sample (k=23 of N=66) plus an edge-anchored node sample (~12 unique nodes), per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/metaphysics.md. Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-MET fully delivered: 23-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review landed in metaphysics.md (309 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts get fortified at the closeout.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0109 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-MET landed a 23-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/metaphysics.md (309 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 20 sound (87%), 2 defensible (E-3 modality→essence_metaphysical — modal-essentialism vs Finean-essentialism framing-choice clusters with frameworks-vs-foundations dialectical-ordering pattern though distinct in kind from S-0108 E-5 frameworks-vs-motivations because this is a metaontological commitment not just a pedagogical ordering choice; E-12 abstract_object→possible_worlds — metaontological commitment to ersatzism over Lewisian modal realism, the ersatzist treatment of possible worlds as abstract entities is one of two live SEP-treated options), 1 weak/redundant (E-10 time→mctaggarts_paradox — long-distance shortcut over the more proximate time→a_theory_of_time→mctaggarts_paradox path; E-17 a_theory_of_time→mctaggarts_paradox is the more proximate prereq edge that the shortcut runs over; pattern is in the same redundancy class as S-0108 E-17 + E-20 species-shadowing-genus pattern but has a different shape — long-distance shortcut over multi-hop path rather than parallel sibling edges; SECOND subdomain audit surfacing the parallel-edge weak/redundant pattern, on track to qualify as a new gate-feasible audit-system-input class via aggregate scan at closeout). Node-verdict tally: 10 sound, 2 granularity-mismatch (N-4 modality — summary explicitly framed as 'the metaphysics of necessity and possibility' with atomic children possible_worlds + essence_metaphysical + modal_realism in the graph as separate nodes; N-6 mereology — summary explicitly framed as 'the formal theory of parts and wholes' with atomic children composition_mereological + simples + gunk + universalism + nihilism in the graph as separate nodes; both parallel S-0105 N-8 bayesian_epistemology + S-0108 N-4 moral_epistemology + N-9 animal_ethics; THIRD subdomain audit confirming the sub-discipline-label-with-content pattern is graph-wide). Substantive defects: 5 of 35 sampled elements (14.3%) — between S-0105 epistemology 5.4% and S-0108 ethics 16.7%, well below S-0104 cross-bridge baseline 35.2% and consistent with the structural prediction that within-subdomain edges run cleaner than cross-domain bridges. Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was nowhere near firing — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-11) was 2/11 = 18.2% (E-3 defensible + E-10 weak); standard 35% density held. Three load-bearing aggregate patterns surfaced for the closeout disposition: (1) sub-discipline-label-with-content granularity pattern recurs (N-4 modality + N-6 mereology) — third subdomain audit confirming this is graph-wide; closeout adjudicates STRUCTURALLY (a single decision covering all sub-discipline labels) not per-node; metaphysics-side instances flagged here, candidate-instances NOT in this sample but worth closeout cross-check include `causation` (sound here as a basic category, but borderline) and `time` (marked sound at medium confidence with NOTES distinguishing it from sub-discipline-label pattern as a basic-category label); (2) parallel-edge weak/redundant pattern recurs in a new shape (E-10 long-distance shortcut over multi-hop path, distinct from S-0108's species-shadowing-genus shape but in the same redundancy class — second subdomain audit surfacing the pattern); (3) substantive-content commitment edges encode metaontological choices (E-3 modal-essentialism over Finean essentialism, E-12 ersatzism over Lewisian modal realism — not defects under the routine prompt template but pedagogical-philosophical commitments worth marking for closeout dispositions; the curriculum may want to make the commitments explicit, OR add parallel structures, OR weaken to a more neutral framing). Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 66 within-metaphysics edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed, confirmed graph-wide again; fourth session in a row). No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class surfaced — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals plus S-0104's cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary candidate were not extended (within-metaphysics data did not corroborate the cross-bridge-specific pattern; the parallel-edge pattern from S-0108 + this session is on track to qualify but the closeout adjudicates via aggregate scan). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-3, E-10, E-12, N-4, N-6) get fortified at the closeout per the master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" fortification scope. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0108 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-MET criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-MIN (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied + no depends_on AUDIT-MET; philosophy of mind subdomain, 25 of 70 edges at 35% density). 7 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
